description: Japan's largest printing inks manufacturer (world #2 globally). Operates across Printing Inks (offset, gravure, flexographic inks), Organic Pigments (phthalocyanine, azo, high-performance pigments), Functional Products (PPS compounds, polylactic acid, epoxy resins, liquid crystal polymers), and Coatings. Nagase distributes DIC products — dyes, pigments, and resins — to customers in paints, inks, textiles, and plastics industries. DIC's PPS compounds and specialty resins are also distributed through Nagase Plastics.

_externalRelationships.nagaseRelationship: Nagase Chemical Co., Ltd. (Nagase subsidiary) distributes DIC dyes, pigments, and specialty resins to paints, inks, and plastics industries. Also distributes DIC engineering plastics through Nagase Plastics.
keyProducts: Offset, gravure, flexographic printing inks — world #2 ink maker
Liquid crystal polymer (LCP) compounds — high-frequency electronics
